message:
feat(benchmark): add parallel progress display for worker benchmarks

Replaces sequential worker benchmark output with parallel progress
spinners using MultiProgressManager:

**Before:**
```
  worker1@host1... [done]
  worker2@host2... [benchmarking...]
```

**After:**
```
  worker1@host1  ⠋ queued
  worker2@host2  ⠙ benchmarking
  worker3@host3  ✓ 1.23s (rank #1)
```

Changes:
- Import MultiProgressManager for concurrent spinner management
- Create all spinners upfront in "queued" state
- Update each spinner as benchmark progresses
- Shows real-time status for all workers simultaneously

This improves UX when benchmarking many workers by showing
progress for all of them at once rather than blocking on each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
